chapter_title.en: Chapter 122 – The crowding at the Black Stone

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/19)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/19)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنِّي لَا أَخْلُصُ إِلَى الْحَجَرِ الْأَسْوَدِ فَقَالَ إِذَا طُفْتَ طَوَافَ الْفَرِيضَةِ فَلَا يَضُرُّكَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Yaqoub Bin Shuayb who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘I cannot conclude at (embrace) the Black Stone’. So heasws said: ‘When you have performed the Obligatory Tawaaf, so it would not affect you’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Safwan ibn Yahya from Ya’qub ibn Shu’ayb who has said the following: “I once said to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, that I cannot find an opportunity to reach the Black Stone. He (the Imam) said, ‘If you perform obligatory Tawaf, then it is not harmful.’”
